name: 在一切晴朗的日子里｜On all clear days
short_description: This is an ADV game work in the style of short story writing. On a sunny holiday, the main character returns with his sister to the place where he went when he was a child. "There are so many things I want to say to her, and I want to tell her that I wish I could live with her like I used to.
detailed_description:
Plot Summary

One day, six years after the disaster, "I" took a few days off on Memorial Day to invite my sister:

According to the news, the park next to our old home had reopened after renovations, and I wanted to visit it with her once more.

She agreed and showed up at the agreed time and place.

She probably didn’t know the true purpose of my visit, and she could never have known that this trip would ultimately become the most irreparable wound in her brother’s life.

How he wished it were all just his imagination...

But before witnessing the event unfold with his own eyes, who could be certain of the reality of this moment?

Main Characters

I:

Around 25 years old, currently working as a foreman in a construction team. At the age of nine, his parents divorced, and he lived with his older sister in their father's home until both parents passed away in an accident.

Sister:(cv:冬绫)

The protagonist's biological sister, two years older than him. She excelled in school and consistently ranked at the top of her class. Currently, she is a senior executive at a certain company. She is capable and decisive, adhering to some form of progressive values.

Operation Tips

Right-click----Return

Hold Enter----Fast forward

Contact the Author

Author's Bilibili/Weibo: Lingxu Zhiyou

Feedback/Discussion group: 901140212
